root_text.sn45.48:1.2: “Sace vo, bhikkhave, aññatitthiyā paribbājakā evaṁ puccheyyuṁ:
root_text.sn45.48:1.3: ‘kimatthiyaṁ, āvuso, samaṇe gotame brahmacariyaṁ vussatī’ti, evaṁ puṭṭhā tumhe, bhikkhave, tesaṁ aññatitthiyānaṁ paribbājakānaṁ evaṁ byākareyyātha:
root_text.sn45.48:1.5: Sace pana vo, bhikkhave, aññatitthiyā paribbājakā evaṁ puccheyyuṁ:
root_text.sn45.48:1.6: ‘atthi panāvuso, maggo, atthi paṭipadā anupādāparinibbānāyā’ti, evaṁ puṭṭhā tumhe, bhikkhave, tesaṁ aññatitthiyānaṁ paribbājakānaṁ evaṁ byākareyyātha:
root_text.sn45.48:1.7: ‘atthi kho, āvuso, maggo, atthi paṭipadā anupādāparinibbānāyā’ti.
root_text.sn45.48:1.8: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, maggo, katamā ca paṭipadā anupādāparinibbānāya?
root_text.sn45.48:1.11: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, maggo, ayaṁ paṭipadā anupādāparinibbānāyāti.
root_text.sn45.48:1.12: Evaṁ puṭṭhā tumhe, bhikkhave, tesaṁ aññatitthiyānaṁ paribbājakānaṁ evaṁ byākareyyāthā”ti.

translation_text.sn45.48:0.2: 5. Abbreviated Texts on Followers of Other Religions
translation_text.sn45.48:0.3: Extinguishment With No Fuel For Grasping
translation_text.sn45.48:1.2: “Mendicants, if wanderers who follow another religion were to ask you:
translation_text.sn45.48:1.3: ‘Reverends, what’s the purpose of leading the spiritual life under the ascetic Gotama?’ You should answer them like this:
translation_text.sn45.48:1.4: ‘The purpose of leading the spiritual life under the Buddha is complete extinguishment with no fuel for grasping.’
translation_text.sn45.48:1.5: If wanderers of other religions were to ask you:
translation_text.sn45.48:1.6: ‘Is there a path and a practice for complete extinguishment with no fuel for grasping?’ You should answer them like this:
translation_text.sn45.48:1.7: ‘There is a path and a practice for complete extinguishment with no fuel for grasping.’
translation_text.sn45.48:1.8: And what is that path, what is that practice for complete extinguishment with no fuel for grasping?
translation_text.sn45.48:1.9: It is simply this noble eightfold path, that is:
translation_text.sn45.48:1.10: right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion.
translation_text.sn45.48:1.11: This is the path, this is the practice for complete extinguishment with no fuel for grasping.
translation_text.sn45.48:1.12: When questioned by wanderers of other religions, that’s how you should answer them.”

reference_text.sn45.48:1.1: csp1ed14.23, csp2ed14.23, dr19.33, ms14S5_150, msdiv48, pts-vp-pli5.29, sya19.35, vri27.27
